mapper.select:
select ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.is_deleted as apartment_is_deleted, ai.introduction, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release from room_info ri left join apartment_info ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 left join payment_type pt on pt.id in (select payment_type_id from room_payment_type where room_id = ri.id and is_deleted = 0) and pt.is_deleted = 0
and ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1 and ri.id not in (select room_id from lease_agreement where status in (2, 5) and is_deleted = 0) and ai.province_id = #{queryVo.provinceId} and ai.city_id = #{queryVo.cityId} and ai.district_id = #{queryVo.districtId} and pt.id = #{queryVo.paymentTypeId} and ri.rent between #{queryVo.minRent} and #{queryVo.maxRent}
order by rent asc
order by rent desc
select name, url from graph_info where is_deleted = 0 and item_id = #{id} and item_type = 2
select id, name, type, is_deleted from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from room_label where room_id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0)

select ri.id, ri.room_number, ri.rent, ai.id as apartment_id, ai.name as apartment_name, ai.province_id, ai.province_name, ai.city_id, ai.city_name, ai.district_id, ai.district_name, ai.is_deleted as apartment_is_deleted, ai.introduction, ai.address_detail, ai.latitude, ai.longitude, ai.phone, ai.is_release from room_info ri left join apartment_info ai on ri.apartment_id = ai.id and ai.is_deleted = 0 where ri.is_deleted = 0 and ri.is_release = 1 and ri.id not in (select room_id from lease_agreement where status in (2, 5) and is_deleted = 0) and ri.apartment_id = #{id}
